title: arundarbor distorta
side_effects: Arundarbor distorta can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and rapid heartbeat, which may be caused by the plant's toxic alkaloids. In severe cases, consuming large quantities of the plant can lead to respiratory failure, seizures, and even coma. Additionally, prolonged exposure to the plant's extract can cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, and vision disturbances. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for any health purposes to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
